name: claw-migration
description: Push and pull complete OpenClaw agent migration packages through configured remotes.

interface.shortDescription: Push and pull a single OpenClaw agent through a remote.
interface.longDescription: Configures remote-backed agent migration for OpenClaw, with preview-first workflows, bindings switching, and gateway restarts.
defaultPrompt: Preview a push for my main OpenClaw agent.
Pull an agent migration from my default remote.
Show me why a migration remote is blocked.
